title: StudioDash Integrations
description: Connect StudioDash with App Store Connect, Cloudflare, Google services, GitHub, and other developer platforms to bring your data together in one place.
summary: StudioDash connects the services developers use every day, making it easier to monitor apps, websites, advertising, revenue, and provider health from one workspace.

featureShowcases.heading: Bring Your Services Together
featureShowcases.summary: Monitor all of your connected developer services from a single dashboard.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash brings together the tools you already use, making it easier to understand how your apps, websites, advertising, and developer services are performing. Provider Health clearly shows whether a service is connected, requires attention, or is still waiting to be configured.
bullets: Connect Apple, Google, Cloudflare, advertising, and development services.
Clearly understand the health of every provider.
See exactly why information is available, unavailable, or waiting for setup.

image.alt: StudioDash integrations dashboard showing provider status
image.caption: Monitor every connected service from one place.

sections.heading: Designed Around Your Existing Tools
paragraphs: StudioDash connects with the services independent developers already rely on to build, publish, and manage their products.
Instead of switching between multiple websites and dashboards, StudioDash brings important information together while clearly showing the health and status of every connected provider.

sections.heading: Supported Integrations
paragraphs: StudioDash is designed to support a growing range of developer services. Some integrations are available today, while others continue to evolve as development progresses.
bullets: App Store Connect – App lifecycle, downloads, ratings, reviews, and analytics.
AdMob – Advertising performance and revenue reporting.
Cloudflare – Website traffic, analytics, Workers, and provider health.
Google Search Console – Search visibility, indexing, and performance.
Google Ads – Campaign analytics and advertising insights.
GitHub – Repository activity and development workflow.

sections.heading: Expanding Platform Support
paragraphs: Additional integrations will continue to be added as StudioDash evolves, helping developers monitor even more of their workflow from a single application.

The goal isn't to replace every provider dashboard. Instead, StudioDash focuses on bringing together the information developers check most often, making it easier to understand what's happening across their products.
